scripts.dev:all: pnpm dlx concurrently "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_PORT=4001 PORT=4000 pnpm dev" "PORT=4001 pnpm dev:server"
scripts.build:all: pnpm build && cp -r out server/frontend && cp -r out src-tauri/resources/server/frontend
scripts.build:mac:arm64: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && pnpm build && pnpm build:server && rm -rf src-tauri/resources/server/dist src-tauri/resources/server/changelogs src-tauri/resources/server/package-lock.json src-tauri/resources/server/frontend && cp server/package.json src-tauri/resources/server/package.json && cp -r server/dist src-tauri/resources/server/dist && cp server/prisma/schema.prisma src-tauri/resources/server/prisma/schema.prisma && cp -r server/changelogs src-tauri/resources/server/changelogs && cp -r out src-tauri/resources/server/frontend && cd src-tauri/resources/server && npm install --production && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && cd ../../.. && tauri build && node scripts/rename-bundle.mjs aarch64
scripts.build:mac:intel: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && pnpm build && pnpm build:server && rm -rf src-tauri/resources/server/dist src-tauri/resources/server/changelogs src-tauri/resources/server/package-lock.json src-tauri/resources/server/frontend && cp server/package.json src-tauri/resources/server/package.json && cp -r server/dist src-tauri/resources/server/dist && cp server/prisma/schema.prisma src-tauri/resources/server/prisma/schema.prisma && cp -r server/changelogs src-tauri/resources/server/changelogs && cp -r out src-tauri/resources/server/frontend && cd src-tauri/resources/server && npm install --production && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && cd ../../.. && tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin && node scripts/rename-bundle.mjs x86_64
scripts.build:windows: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && pnpm build && pnpm build:server && node scripts/package-server.mjs && tauri build
scripts.build:windows:arm64: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && pnpm build && pnpm build:server && node scripts/package-server.mjs && tauri build --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.stop: lsof -ti:4000,4001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pgrep -f prisma | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; true
